

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap');

.cw {
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  max-width: 860px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3rem 0 2rem;
}

.cw-eyebrow {
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #888;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.cw-header h1 {
  font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
  font-size: 44px;
  font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
}

.cw-header h1 em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: #888;
}

.cw-header p {
  font-size: 15px;
  color: #666;
  line-height: 1.7;
  max-width: 400px;
  margin: 0;
  font-weight: 300;
}

.cw-rule {
  width: 100%;
  height: 1px;
  background: #e5e5e5;
  margin: 2rem 0;
  border: none;
}

.cw-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.7fr;
  gap: 3rem;
  align-items: start;
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .cw-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
  .cw-header h1 { font-size: 32px; }
}

.cw-left {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1.75rem;
}

.info-block { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }

.info-lbl {
  font-size: 10px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: #aaa;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.info-val {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #333;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  font-weight: 400;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}

.info-val:hover { color: #666; }

.avail-dot {
  width: 7px;
  height: 7px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #3B6D11;
  display: inline-block;
  margin-right: 2px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.socials-label {
  font-size: 10px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: #aaa;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.social-row { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }

.social-link {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #666;
  text-decoration: none;
  padding: 7px 10px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  transition: all 0.15s;
  font-weight: 400;
}

.social-link:hover {
  background: #f5f5f5;
  border-color: #e5e5e5;
  color: #333;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.social-link svg {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  color: #aaa;
}

.social-name {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #bbb;
  margin-left: auto;
}

.cw-form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }

.field-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }

.field-group label {
  font-size: 10px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: #888;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.cw-form input,
.cw-form textarea {
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 300;
  background: #fafafa;
  border: 1px solid #e5e5e5;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 9px 13px;
  color: #333;
  width: 100%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  transition: border-color 0.15s;
  outline: none;
}

.cw-form input:focus,
.cw-form textarea:focus { border-color: #bbb; }

.cw-form textarea {
  resize: vertical;
  min-height: 110px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 7px; }

.chip {
  font-size: 12px;
  padding: 4px 11px;
  border-radius: 99px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  background: transparent;
  color: #888;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  transition: all 0.15s;
  font-weight: 400;
}

.chip:hover { background: #f5f5f5; }

.chip.sel {
  background: #fff;
  border-color: #888;
  color: #333;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.submit-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-top: 4px;
}

.submit-note {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #bbb;
  font-weight: 300;
}

.btn-send {
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  padding: 9px 22px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #222;
  color: #fff;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 7px;
  transition: opacity 0.15s, transform 0.1s;
}

.btn-send:hover { opacity: 0.82; }
.btn-send:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

.success-msg {
  display: none;
  background: #eaf3de;
  border: 1px solid #c0dd97;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #3B6D11;
  gap: 9px;
  align-items: center;
}

.success-msg.show { display: flex; }
</style>

<div class="cw">
  <div class="cw-header">
    <div class="cw-eyebrow">Get in touch</div>
    <h1>Let's <em>Connect.</em></h1>
    <p>Whether you have a project in mind, a question, or just want to connect — my inbox is open.</p>
  </div>

  <hr class="cw-rule">

  <div class="cw-layout">
    <div class="cw-left">

      <div class="info-block">
        <span class="info-lbl">Email</span>
        <a href="mailto:asmcculloch46@gmail.com" class="info-val">
          asmcculloch46@gmail.com
        </a>
      </div>

      <div class="info-block">
        <span class="info-lbl">Status</span>
        <span class="info-val" style="cursor:default;">
          <span class="avail-dot"></span>
          Available for projects
        </span>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="socials-label">Find me online</div>
        <div class="social-row">

          <a href="https://github.com/alex-mcculloch" class="social-link" target="_blank">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M9 19c-5 1.5-5-2.5-7-3m14 6v-3.87a3.37 3.37 0 0 0-.94-2.61c3.14-.35 6.44-1.54 6.44-7A5.44 5.44 0 0 0 20 4.77 5.07 5.07 0 0 0 19.91 1S18.73.65 16 2.48a13.38 13.38 0 0 0-7 0C6.27.65 5.09 1 5.09 1A5.07 5.07 0 0 0 5 4.77a5.44 5.44 0 0 0-1.5 3.78c0 5.42 3.3 6.61 6.44 7A3.37 3.37 0 0 0 9 18.13V22"/></svg>
            <span>github.com/alex-mcculloch</span>
            <span class="social-name">GitHub</span>
          </a>

          <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/amcculloch" class="social-link" target="_blank">
            <img src="images/linkedin.png" alt="" aria-hidden="true" style="width:16px; height:16px; flex-shrink:0;">
            <span>amcculloch</span>
            <span class="social-name">LinkedIn</span>
          </a>

          <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/politicalexplorer.bsky.social" class="social-link" target="_blank">
            <img src="images/bluesky.png" alt="" aria-hidden="true" style="width:16px; height:16px; flex-shrink:0;">
            <span>@politicalexploerer</span>
            <span class="social-name">Bluesky</span>
          </a>

        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="cw-form">
      <div class="field-group">
        <label for="cf-name">Name</label>
        <input type="text" id="cf-name" placeholder="Your name" />
      </div>

      <div class="field-group">
        <label for="cf-email">Email</label>
        <input type="email" id="cf-email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
      </div>

      <div class="field-group">
        <label>Topic</label>
        <div class="chips">
          <button class="chip" onclick="toggleChip(this)">Collaboration</button>
          <button class="chip" onclick="toggleChip(this)">Consulting</button>
          <button class="chip" onclick="toggleChip(this)">Speaking</button>
          <button class="chip" onclick="toggleChip(this)">Question</button>
          <button class="chip" onclick="toggleChip(this)">Other</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="field-group">
        <label for="cf-msg">Message</label>
        <textarea id="cf-msg" placeholder="What's on your mind?"></textarea>
      </div>

      <div class="success-msg" id="success-banner">
        ✓ Message sent — I'll be in touch soon.
      </div>

      <div class="submit-row">
        <span class="submit-note">Replies within 1–2 business days.</span>
        <button class="btn-send" onclick="handleSend()">
          Send message →
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
function toggleChip(el) { el.classList.toggle('sel'); }

function handleSend() {
  var name  = document.getElementById('cf-name').value.trim();
  var email = document.getElementById('cf-email').value.trim();
  var msg   = document.getElementById('cf-msg').value.trim();

  if (!name || !email || !msg) {
    var id = !name ? 'cf-name' : !email ? 'cf-email' : 'cf-msg';
    document.getElementById(id).focus();
    return;
  }

  fetch('https://formspree.io/f/xzdoneld', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ name: name, email: email, message: msg })
  })
  .then(function(res) {
    if (res.ok) {
      document.getElementById('success-banner').classList.add('show');
      document.getElementById('cf-name').value  = '';
      document.getElementById('cf-email').value = '';
      document.getElementById('cf-msg').value   = '';
      document.querySelectorAll('.chip.sel').forEach(function(c){ c.classList.remove('sel'); });
    } else {
      alert('Something went wrong — please try emailing me directly.');
    }
  })
  .catch(function() {
    alert('Could not send — please try emailing me directly.');
  });
}
</script>
```
